title: Getting Started in IPython & Jupyter: An Exploratory Workflow
description: A flowchart illustrating the typical iterative workflow for getting started with exploratory data analysis (EDA) in a Jupyter Notebook environment.
relationships: Process starts by launching the Jupyter environment and creating a new notebook, leading to the import of necessary libraries. The loaded dataset is then inspected to understand its structure, followed by a cycle of data cleaning and exploratory analysis, with insights documented throughout the process. This cycle is iterative, often requiring a return to previous steps based on new findings.
